Scabiosa scabra, commonly known as Scabrethia scabra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. It is valued for its numerous health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, due in part to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Scabiosa scabra include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Scabiosa scabra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
